cards.title: Web Development
cards.body: Learning frontend and backend fundamentals while building real projects from scratch.

cards.body: Understanding servers, APIs, routing, middleware, databases, and how modern web applications work.

cards.title: Developer + Builder
cards.body: Become someone who can build products, automate workflows, communicate ideas, and solve real problems.
